chartType.title: InsightsChartType
chartType.tsType: ChartType.Bar | ChartType.Line | ChartType.Column | ChartType.Pie | ChartType.Table | ChartType.Metric | ChartType.FunnelSteps | ChartType.FunnelTopPaths | ChartType.RetentionCurve

valueField.description: valueField required when sorting by value (sortBy.Value) and there is > 1 valueField. Used for data tables.

line.description: In the bookmark, line chart can either have the old FlatSortConfig or the new SortConfig format

individualSelectedSegments.description: used for flat data, entire selected segments

filteredBreakdownSegments.description: used for nested (bar chart) data, filtered segments at each level

overrides.description: used for specifying label or color overrides on specific segments
overrides.title: LegendOverrides

OldTableSortByValue.description:
Same as SortByValueConfig except:
1) sortColumn instead of valueField
2) colSortAttrs can only be FlatLabelSortConfig, not FlatValueSortConfig

Must convert this for use with data-table
OldTableSortByValue.title: OldTableSortByValue

PER_USER_AGGREGATIONS.description: only a subset of operations are valid for per user aggregations, keep this enum separate
PER_USER_AGGREGATIONS.title: PER_USER_AGGREGATIONS

color.description: might still exist on old bookmarks, but it's not used anymore

prop.description: raw string value of the segment

propName.description: user-friendly renaming of prop, suitable for printing

cohortDesc.description:
Query parameters not encapsulated by the prop which are necessary to recreate
this segment.

ex: bucketSize and index for a bucketed numeric segment

valueField.description: value field to specify which value to sort secondarily on

SortByValueConfig.description:
sort by a single value column (flat sort). Still persists colSortAttrs so that if we switch back to sorting by
columns, we preserve the prior sorts on the columns

valueField.description: valueField required when sorting by value (sortBy.Value) and there is > 1 valueField. Used for data tables.

SortByValueConfig.title: SortByValueConfig

TopLevelMetricType.title: TopLevelMetricType
TopLevelMetricType.description: This exists at the top of a metric / show clause.
